data.title: Standard Chartered Announces Change in Major Holdings
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced a change in its major holdings with an acquisition or disposal of voting rights by The Capital Group Companies, Inc., based in Los Angeles, USA. As of February 19, 2025, The Capital Group Companies holds a 5.042206% voting rights stake in Standard Chartered, indicating a strategic position in the company’s governance and potential influence on its decision-making processes.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a British multinational banking and financial services company headquartered in London, England. It operates in consumer, corporate, and institutional banking and treasury services, with a focus on markets in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

YTD Price Performance: 24.30%

Average Trading Volume: 5,282

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $36.05B

data.title: Radiopharm Theranostics to Present at TD Cowen Healthcare Conference
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Radiopharm Theranostics Limited ( (AU:RAD) ) is now available.

Radiopharm Theranostics Limited announced its participation in the TD Cowen Annual Healthcare Conference in Boston, where CEO Riccardo Canevari will present the company’s investment proposition. This presentation is a strategic move to attract investor interest, showcasing Radiopharm’s world-class pipeline and potential market leadership in radiopharmaceuticals, particularly in areas with high unmet medical needs.

More about Radiopharm Theranostics Limited

Radiopharm Theranostics Limited is a clinical-stage radiotherapeutics company focused on developing innovative radiopharmaceutical products for both diagnostic and therapeutic applications. It has a deep pipeline of differentiated molecules including peptides, small molecules, and monoclonal antibodies, targeting cancers such as brain, lung, breast, and pancreas, and is listed on the ASX since November 2021.

data.title: Aerometrex Initiates Strategic Review to Unlock Business Value
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Aerometrex Ltd. ( (AU:AMX) ) has provided an update.

Aerometrex Limited has initiated a Strategic Review of its operations, led by Acting CEO Rob Veitch, with the aim of optimizing its sales pipeline and aligning business value with market valuation. The review will explore cost optimization, margin growth, and revenue acceleration, particularly focusing on the MetroMap unit, while also evaluating unsolicited corporate approaches to enhance shareholder value.

More about Aerometrex Ltd.

Aerometrex Limited is a leading aerial mapping business that specializes in aerial imagery subscription services through MetroMap, as well as LiDAR and 3D services. The company operates extensively throughout Australia and offers its 3D services globally.

data.title: Hansen Technologies Director Alters Shareholding
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Hansen Technologies Limited ( (AU:HSN) ).

Hansen Technologies Limited has announced a change in the securities interest of its director, Lisa Pendlebury. On February 21, 2025, Pendlebury acquired 5,715 ordinary fully paid shares through an on-market trade, increasing her total shareholding to 19,584. This transaction, valued at $30,017, reflects an increase in her indirect interest in the company, potentially signaling confidence in the company’s future performance and stability.

More about Hansen Technologies Limited

Hansen Technologies Limited is a company that operates in the technology sector, focusing on providing software solutions and services. It specializes in customer information and billing systems for utilities, telecommunications, and pay-TV sectors. The company is known for its commitment to innovation and enhancing operational efficiency for its clients.

data.title: Amcor Announces Strategic Merger with Berry Global Group
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Amcor PLC Shs Chess Depository Interests ( (AU:AMC) ) is now available.

Amcor plc has announced plans to combine with Berry Global Group, a move that will establish a global leader in flexible packaging, containers, and closures for consumer and healthcare customers. This strategic merger is aimed at enhancing innovation capabilities and expanding the company’s scale. Significant progress has been made in integration planning, with regulatory reviews advancing and a joint proxy statement filed. Shareholder votes from both companies are scheduled for February 25, 2025, to finalize the agreement. The combination is expected to be completed by mid-2025, subject to customary closing conditions.

More about Amcor PLC Shs Chess Depository Interests

Amcor is a global leader in developing and producing responsible packaging solutions across various materials for food, beverage, pharmaceutical, medical, home and personal-care, and other products. The company focuses on creating recyclable, reusable, and lightweight packaging, utilizing an increasing amount of recycled content. With operations in 212 locations across 40 countries, Amcor generated $13.6 billion in annual sales in fiscal year 2024.

YTD Price Performance: 7.35%

Average Trading Volume: 2,221,499

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$23.3B

data.title: Livium Secures A$4.5m Placement and ARENA Grant to Advance LFP Plant
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Lithium Australia NL ( (AU:LIT) ).

Livium Ltd has successfully raised A$4.5 million through a placement involving sophisticated and professional investors, which will be used to further its Australian LFP Demonstration Plant and expand its battery recycling operations. The company also secured a significant A$30 million grant from the Australian Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA) that will aid in establishing the LFP demonstration plant, potentially enhancing Livium’s market positioning and operational capabilities in the battery materials sector.

More about Lithium Australia NL

Livium Ltd, traded on the ASX under the symbol LIT, operates within the battery materials industry. The company focuses on the development of lithium ferro phosphate (LFP) technology and operates a battery recycling business through its wholly owned subsidiary VSPC.

data.title: Jayride Announces Corporate Restructuring and New Leadership
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Jayride Group Ltd. ( (AU:JAY) ) is now available.

Jayride Group Limited has announced a corporate restructuring and a partially underwritten entitlement offer to raise up to $4.3 million, aiming to pave the way for growth. The company is undergoing significant leadership changes, including appointing a new CEO and other key executives, to lead its restructuring efforts. This includes a reduction in operational costs and the conversion of secured convertible notes into equity to simplify its capital structure. These moves are expected to strengthen Jayride’s industry position and improve supplier relations, potentially impacting stakeholders positively by stabilizing and growing the business.

More about Jayride Group Ltd.

Jayride Group Limited is a global online travel marketplace specializing in airport transfers. The company focuses on connecting travelers with local transfer companies, offering a wide range of transport options to improve the travel experience.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$954.2K

data.title: Rox Resources Sells Mt Fisher Gold Project to High-Tech Metals
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

High-Tech Metals Limited ( (AU:HTM) ) has provided an update.

Rox Resources Limited has entered into an agreement to sell its Mt Fisher Gold Project to High-Tech Metals Limited for $1.5 million in cash, along with shares and a royalty arrangement. This divestment aims to boost Rox’s cash reserves and support its primary focus on developing the Youanmi Gold Project, positioning HTM to advance the Mt Fisher project.

More about High-Tech Metals Limited

Rox Resources Limited is a West Australian-focused gold exploration and development company. It owns the Youanmi Gold Project, which has a mineral resource estimate of 2.3 million ounces of contained gold and holds significant existing infrastructure to support mining operations.
